== Taoist Yu Ji ♂ ==
The immortality of his spirit helped him get away from Sun Ce the Demon Taoist!

=== Begin Friendship ===
To obtain Taoist Yu Ji, upgrade Taoist Yu Ji to T9 in [[Cathay Generals]].

===☆☆☆ > ★☆☆===
After 14 letters back and forth, Yu Ji will arrive at [[Home Base]] and gift Cathay Treasure Map +50.

=== ★☆☆ > ★★★ ===
After 10 letters back and forth, Yu Ji will move in permanently with his minion, Drawn Dragon.

== Rent ==
[[File:Taoist Yu Ji rent.png|frameless|left]]

Taoist Yu Ji rent is collected on '''Tuesday''' and found in the Alchemy Pot in his room.

 '''Normal Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Taichi Fish, +10}}

 '''Rare Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Incense, +1|orange}}

 '''1-time Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Advance Elixir|green}}

{{Clear}}

== Relics ==
Upgrading these will earn Alchemy Cases!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"  
! rowspan="2" |Relic Tier
! colspan="3" |Reward
|-
!Blue Relics
!Purple Relics
!Orange Relics
|-
|★ 
|Novice Alchemy Case +2
|Expert Alchemy Case +2
|Master Alchemy Case +2
|-
|★★
|Novice Alchemy Case +2
|Expert Alchemy Case +2
|Master Alchemy Case +2
|-
|★★★
|Novice Alchemy Case +2
|Expert Alchemy Case +2
|Master Alchemy Case +2
|-
|★★★★
|Novice Alchemy Case +4
|Expert Alchemy Case +4
|Master Alchemy Case +4
|-
|★★★★★
|
|Expert Alchemy Case +6
|Master Alchemy Case +6
|-
|★★★★★★
|
|
|Master Alchemy Case +8
|}

{| class="wiki-table" style="width:100%; text-align:center;" 
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Melcades' Prophecy}}{{Relink|Melcades' Prophecy}}
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Haradric Cube}}{{Relink|Haradric Cube}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Deity Quetzalcoatl}}{{Relink|Deity Quetzalcoatl}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Sorron's Eye}}{{Relink|Sorron's Eye}}
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Time-Travel Box}}{{Relink|Time-Travel Box}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Aladdin's Lamp}}{{Relink|Aladdin's Lamp}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Ark of Covenant}}{{Relink|Ark of Covenant}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Unispark}}{{Relink|Unispark}}
|}

==Taoist Yu Ji's Amulet==
Spirit of sky and spirit of earth, in the name of Daode Tianzun! Spirits in all directions, heed my call!

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Research Skill<br>Required
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||0||FTH +5||Quarry Output +1%
|-
|2||180||2k||FTH +10||Quarry Output +2%
|-
|3||190||4.5k||FTH +15||Quarry Output +3% 
|-
|4||200||8k||FTH +20||Quarry Output +4%
|-
|5||210||12.5k||FTH +25||Quarry Output +5%
|-
|6||220||18k||FTH +30||Quarry Output +6%
|-
|7||230||24.5k||FTH +35||Quarry Output +7%
|-
|8||240||32k||FTH +40||Quarry Output +8%
|-
|9||250||40.5k||FTH +45||Quarry Output +9%
|-
|10||260||50k||FTH +50||Quarry Output +10%
|-
|11||270||60.5k||FTH +55||Quarry Output +11%
|-
|12||285||72k||FTH +60||Quarry Output +12%
|-
|13||300||84.5k||FTH +65||Quarry Output +13%
|-
|14||315||98k||FTH +70||Quarry Output +14%
|-
|15||330||112k||FTH +75||Quarry Output +15%
|-
|16||345||123k||FTH +80||Quarry Output +16%
|-
|17||360||144k||FTH +85||Quarry Output +17%
|-
|18||375||162k||FTH +90||Quarry Output +18%
|-
|19||390||180k||FTH +95||Quarry Output +19%
|-
|20||400||200k||FTH +100||Quarry Output +20% 
|-
|21||420||220k||FTH +105||Quarry Output +21%
|-
|22||440||242k||FTH +110||Quarry Output +22%
|-
|23||460||264k||FTH +115||Quarry Output +23%
|-
|24||480||285k||FTH +120||Quarry Output +24%
|-
|25||500||309k||FTH +125||Quarry Output +25%
|-
|26||520||333k||FTH +130||Quarry Output +26%
|-
|27||540||357k||FTH +135||Quarry Output +27%
|-
|28||560||381k||FTH +140||Quarry Output +28%
|-
|29||580||405k||FTH +145||Quarry Output +29%
|-
|30||600||429k||FTH +150||Quarry Output +30%
|}

==Commander==
A good commander can make the troops more effective!

Commander can only be leveled up as far as Taoisit Yu Ji's Amulet is. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +10
|-
|2||4k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +20 
|-
|3||6k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +30
|-
|4||8k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +40
|-
|5||10k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +50
|-
|6||12k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +60
|-
|7||14k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +70
|-
|8||16k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +80
|-
|9||18k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +90
|-
|10||20k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +100 
|-
|11||22k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +110 
|-
|12||24k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +120 
|-
|13||26k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +130 
|-
|14||28k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +140 
|-
|15||30k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +150 
|-
|16||32k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +160
|-
|17||34k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +170
|-
|18||36k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +180
|-
|19||38k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +190
|-
|20||40k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +200
|-
|21||42k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +210
|-
|22||44k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +220
|-
|23||46k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +230
|-
|24||48k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +240
|-
|25||50k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +250
|-
|26||55k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +260 
|-
|27||60k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +270
|-
|28||65k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +280
|-
|29||70k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +290
|-
|30||75k||Dragon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop DEF +300
|}

==Research Ability==
Below is a table of the research manual cost to upgrade each research gene. Taoist Yu Ji specializes in '''Dragon Gene''' and therefore the research manual cost for the Dragon is halved. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Manuals Required 
|-
|1-10||1
|-
|11-20||2
|-
|21-30||3
|-
|31-40||4
|-
|61-70||20
|-
|71-80||40
|-
|81-90||60
|-
|91-95||80
|-
|97||200
|-
|98||400
|-
|99||600
|-
|100||800
|}

==Minion - Drawn Dragon==
The immortality of his spirit helpd him get away from Sun Ce the Demon Taoist!

===Special Ability - Rain Charm===
Per 10 Drawn Dragons in battle, Troop Water RES +1 (multiplied by minion level)

===Minion Relics===
Upgrading these relics will buff your Drawn Dragons!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"
!Name
!★☆☆☆☆☆
!★★☆☆☆☆
!★★★☆☆☆
!★★★★☆☆
!★★★★★☆
!★★★★★★
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Gone with the Wind}}<br>{{relink|Gone with the Wind}}
|HP +1%
|DEF +1%
|ATK +1%
|RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Storyteller}}<br>{{relink|Storyteller}}
|HP +1%
|DEF +1%
|ATK +1%
|RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Jade Burial Suit}}<br>{{relink|Jade Burial Suit}}
|HP +2%
|DEF +2%
|ATK +2%
|RUSH +2%
|All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Rosetta Stone}}<br>{{relink|Rosetta Stone}}
|HP +2%
|DEF +2%
|ATK +2%
|RUSH +2%
|All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Dead Sea Scrolls}}<br>{{relink|Dead Sea Scrolls}}
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Caesar Statue}}<br>{{relink|Caesar Statue}}
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Holy Loaves}}<br>{{relink|Holy Loaves}}
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Kepler Telescope}}<br>{{relink|Kepler Telescope}}
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|}

[[Category:Partners]]
[[Category:Quarry Output Boost]]
[[Category:Minion DEF Boost]]
